summary: Iteration 43: Tested P0 and P1 bug fixes for Data Center and Site persistence. Both bugs are FIXED.
passed_tests: 1. P0 Bug - ud-5 field update: Click '+ Add Data Center' on Sizing page → ud-5 field in Discovery IPAM section updates correctly - PASS
2. P0 Bug - TopBar DC count sync: Adding DC from Sizing page updates TopBar DC count immediately - PASS
3. P1 Bug - Data Center persistence: Added Data Center persists after navigating to Discovery and back to Sizing - PASS
4. P1 Bug - Site persistence: Added Site persists after navigating to Discovery and back to Sizing - PASS
5. TopBar sync - DC: TopBar shows correct DC count (DC 2) after adding Data Centers - PASS
6. TopBar sync - Sites: TopBar shows correct Sites count (Sites 2) after adding Sites - PASS
7. Sizing table persistence: All rows (Data Center 1, Data Center 2, HQ Office, Site 4) persist across navigation - PASS
8. Console logging: addManualDataCenter logs 'Setting ud-5 to X' and 'Saved to server successfully' - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: addManualDataCenter() correctly calls setAnswer('ud-5', newCount) and saveToServer() to persist changes
addManualSite() correctly uses contextAddSite() to persist sites in context
saveToServer() is called after adding DC to ensure immediate persistence before navigation
Console logs confirm the fix: '[addManualDataCenter] Setting ud-5 to X' and '[addManualDataCenter] Saved to server successfully'
seed_data_creation: Used existing customer 'Not Your Customer' - added Data Center 1, Data Center 2, and Site 4 during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 bugs are FIXED. Key fixes: (1) addManualDataCenter now calls saveToServer() after setAnswer to ensure persistence before navigation, (2) Manual sites now use context addSite() instead of local state to persist across navigation. Test data created: Data Center 1, Data Center 2, Site 4 on customer 'Not Your Customer'.

p0_bug_ud5_update.description: Adding DC from Sizing page updates '# of Data Centers' (ud-5) field in Discovery IPAM section
p0_bug_ud5_update.verification: ud-5 field shows correct count after adding DC

p1_bug_dc_persistence.description: Manually added Data Centers persist across navigation
p1_bug_dc_persistence.verification: Data Center 1 and Data Center 2 visible in Sizing table after navigating to Discovery and back

p1_bug_site_persistence.description: Manually added Sites persist across navigation
p1_bug_site_persistence.verification: Site 4 visible in Sizing table after navigating to Discovery and back

topbar_sync.dc_pills: Data Center 1 and Data Center 2 pills visible
topbar_sync.site_pills: HQ Office and Site 4 pills visible
